items.headline: Feltner building argument for being Rockies' top starter

news_items.headline: Crochet: Lat strain 'lot worse than we thought'
news_items.summary: Red Sox ace Garrett Crochet, who has been on the IL since April 29 due to a lat strain, on Wednesday said the injury "is a lot worse than we thought."

news_items.headline: D-backs' Lovullo defends Marte: 'Great teammate'
news_items.summary: Diamondbacks manager Torey Lovullo went to bat for Ketel Marte on Tuesday, saying any idea that the star second baseman is fracturing the Arizona clubhouse "couldn't be further from the truth."

news_items.headline: Skenes' visit with Little Leaguers for 'love' of g...
news_items.summary: Paul Skenes, the Pirates ace, recently found himself at a Little League practice in Pittsburgh. He described his stop to hang out with the Little Leaguers as an important reminder of why he started playing baseball in the first place.

news_items.headline: Pirates' Cruz lands on IL with broken left hand
news_items.summary: Pirates outfielder Oneil Cruz went on the 10-day injured list Wednesday after tests revealed non-displaced fractures between his ring finger and his pinkie.

news_items.headline: Braves' Acuña again to IL with hamstring strain
news_items.summary: Braves outfielder Ronald Acuña Jr. has been placed on the 10-day injured list after he again suffered a strained left hamstring.

news_items.headline: Phils' Rojas, nearing end of ban, suffers UCL tear...
news_items.summary: Phillies OF Johan Rojas, who was nearing the end of an 80-game suspension, has suffered a UCL tear in his right elbow, will need surgery and will not return this season.

news_items.headline: 👀 Examining how a salary cap could work in MLB
news_items.summary: We examine how caps function in other pro sports to find out what it means for baseball's ongoing CBA negotiations.

news_items.headline: What all 30 MLB teams must do before the trade dea...
news_items.summary: Is your team going to make a midsummer splash? Here's how the next few weeks could decide the season.

Dodgers expected to put catcher Will Smith on the injured list as neck issue lingers
news_items.summary: Dodgers manager Dave Roberts said catcher Will Smith still has stiffness in his neck, which caused him to sit out for a fourth straight game Wednesday.
